scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,portal,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=packages/api" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000 npm run dev --workspace=packages/portal" "NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:4000 npm run dev --workspace=packages/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/api
